tibs
====

# Available modules


The overview below shows which tibs installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using tibs, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load tibs/0.5.7-GCCcore-15.2.0
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
